summary: Taste Report PNG Image feature testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend generates 1080x1920 PNG image with HoneyGroove branding. Frontend modal displays image with 'Save to Camera Roll' button. Old inline Taste Report card correctly removed.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/valuation/taste-report/image returns valid PNG (Content-Type: image/png, magic bytes verified)
Backend: Returned PNG is exactly 1080x1920 pixels
Backend: GET /api/valuation/collection still works (returns total_value, valued_count, total_count)
Backend: GET /api/valuation/hidden-gems still works (returns top 3 sorted by value)
Backend: GET /api/valuation/record-values still works (returns record_id -> median_value map)
Backend: GET /api/valuation/taste-report JSON still works (returns total_value, most_valuable, over_100_count)
Frontend: Collection page has Taste Report CTA card (dark background with 'Generate →' text)
Frontend: Clicking CTA opens modal with loading spinner then shows generated image
Frontend: Modal has 'Save to Camera Roll' download button
Frontend: Modal shows '1080 × 1920 · designed for Instagram Stories' text
Frontend: Old inline Taste Report card (data-testid='taste-report-card') is REMOVED
Frontend: Collection page still shows Value Banner ($7,603)
Frontend: Collection page still shows Hidden Gems section (3 gems)
Frontend: Collection page still shows record value badges (144 badges)
Frontend: Profile page still shows Est. Value stat ($7,603)
Frontend: Honeypot listing modal shows pricing assist helper text ('recent sales: $10.00 — $38.00 on Discogs')
context_for_next_testing_agent: Taste Report PNG image feature fully working. Backend endpoint GET /api/valuation/taste-report/image generates 1080x1920 PNG with: HoneyGroove branding, username, date, total value, stats (records/valued/over $100), most valuable record with cover art, hidden gems top 3 with thumbnails, and thehoneygroove.com footer. Frontend TasteReportCTA component in CollectionPage.js displays CTA card (dark bg) and opens modal with loading state, image display, and download button. Fonts used: DMSerifDisplay-Regular.ttf and Inter.ttf from /app/backend/fonts/.

taste_report_image.ui_location: Collection page CTA card → Modal with image and download button
image_contents: Most valuable record with cover art
Hidden gems top 3 with numbered badges and thumbnails
Honey gold accent bars top and bottom
